name: Jenny's Mini Christmas Puddings
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons No messin' golden set syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the biscuits in a plastic bag, then tie the ends and beat lightly with a rolling pin until the biscuits break into tiny pieces.
2. Carefully stir the biscuits and dried fruit into the chocolate mixture and leave to cool for 30 minutes.
3. Transfer to a large bowl. Roll tablespoons of the mixture in your hands to make 24 small balls. Place on plates, cover loosely with plastic film and chill in the fridge until set.
4. Dust the work surface with icing sugar and roll out marzipan thinly. Cut into small wavy shapes.
5. Brush with jam, then press onto puddings.
6. Roll out 2 ounces green icing thinly and cut out holly leaves. Roll 1 ounce red icing to make berries. Attach leaves and berries with a little jam.
7. Cover with plastic film and eat within 3 days.
